description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named main that runs on push and pull request events. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.8, 3.9, 3.10, 3.11). For each version, check out the code, set up Python, install dependencies with Poetry, run make commands to check dependencies, install dependencies, check code, test code, and run a demo. Upload coverage to Codecov for the ubuntu-latest job with Python 3.8.
